parser_changes.description: Changed unconditional break on 'Changes to Curriculum' to break only if state != BEFORE_TABLE. Allows PMC layout where this block precedes the SP table.
Added 'Certificate Guidebook' to document-type header skip list. Corrects degree_title for PMC guides.
Added break when STANDARD_PATH_RE fires after leaving BEFORE_TABLE state. Stops at first canonical sub-table for MEDETID-style guides. Also applied this session for MEDETID.

structural_notes: All 4 guides use multi-line 3-column SP format
All 4 guides have 2 AoS groups (core + specialty)
Phase A 'Post-Master' section flag was not a structural anomaly — content appears as ordinary AoS courses
Metadata valid: page counts 10-13, versions 202110 and 202306
